description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 機場管理局 早上繁忙時段

2026-04-01T06:09:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to heavy traffic at the road section leading from Airport Road to Hong Kong International Airport’s Terminal 1 Departures Kerb, motorists are advised to use the drop-off area at the Airport’s Car Park 1. Members of the public heading to the Airport are advised to allow sufficient time for their journey and consider taking the Airport Express and buses.
2026-04-01T06:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時機場路通往香港國際機場一號客運大樓離港層落客區的路段交通繁忙，駕駛人士請考慮改用機場一號停車場落客區。前往機場的市民，請預留足夠交通時間，並考慮乘搭機場快綫或巴士。

2026-04-01T12:56:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the holding of the 2026-2027 Hong Kong Road Cycling Race on 5 April 2026 (Sunday), temporary road closures will be implemented at Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung: - The section of Fei Ngo Shan Road from its junction with the access road to Fei Ngo Shan Road house number 19 to a point about 3 kilometres north of the same junction will be temporarily closed from 6.00 am to 11.00 am. During the road closure period of Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung (i. e. from 6.00 am to 11.00 am on 5 April 2026), all vehicular traffic (except emergency vehicles) will be prohibited to enter Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung, until the reopening of the road. Appropriate traffic signs will be erected on site to guide motorists. Other temporary road and traffic control measures, including adjusting the extent of road closures, may be implemented by the Police at short notice depending on the actual traffic conditions. The TD appeals to the public to pay attention to the temporary road closures. Members of the public who plan to go to the affected areas should plan their journey in advance, allow sufficient travelling time to avoid unexpected delay. Motorists and public should exercise patience and follow the instructions of the Police on-site.
2026-04-01T12:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合2026年4月5日(星期日)舉行的2026-2027全港公路單車賽，當局將於活動期間在西貢飛鵝山道實施以下臨時封路安排： -飛鵝山道由其與通往飛鵝山道門牌19號的通道交界處起至同一交界以北約3公里處止的路段將上午6時至上午11時臨時封閉。 西貢飛鵝山道封路期間（即2026年4月5日上午6時至上午11時），所有車輛（緊急車輛除外）不能進入西貢飛鵝山道，直至道路重開為止。有關地點將設置適當的交通標誌，指導駕駛人士。 警方會視乎現場實際路面情況而在短時間內實施其他臨時道路及交通管制措施，包括調整封路範圍。運輸署呼籲市民留意臨時封路安排並應及早計劃行程及預留額外的時間以免延誤。駕駛及公眾人士請保持忍讓，並遵從在場警務人員的指示。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次

2026-04-01T14:42:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: - 5 Apr: G9540 - 6 Apr: G9538 - 7 Apr: G9536, G9544 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9535, G9537, G9539, G9543 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9541 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: - 7 Apr: G9542 Ticketing Methods: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app - Appointed travel agents - Hong Kong West Kowloon Station • Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay) • Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time Train schedules: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app
2026-04-01T14:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站： -4月5日：G9540 -4月6日：G9538 -4月7日：G9536,G9544 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9535,G9537,G9539,G9543 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9541 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站： -4月7日：G9542 購票方式： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 -指定代理 -前往香港西九龍站 •使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶） •使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間 列車服務詳情： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Transport Services and Special Traffic Arrangements during long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 復活節及清明節假期長周末期間的跨境運輸服務及特別交通安排

2026-04-01T18:45:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a large number of cross-boundary passengers and vehicles travelling between Hong Kong and the Mainland or Macao via various land-based boundary control points (BCPs) during long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays (April 3 to 7). The TD urges cross-boundary travellers to plan ahead of their trips and allow sufficient travelling time. The TD has been steering local and cross-boundary public transport (PT) services operators to enhance their capacity and reserve sufficient vehicles and manpower to meet the transport needs of cross-boundary passengers during the long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays. It is anticipated that the waiting time for PT services, including the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) shuttle bus (Gold Bus) and local franchised bus “B” routes connecting various land-based BCPs, may be longer during peak periods of cross-boundary travel. Passengers should avoid travelling during peak hours, observe order while queuing and heed advice from on-site Police and staff of the PT operators. Passengers intending to take cross-boundary coaches are also advised to reserve their coach tickets in advance. Motorists of cross-boundary private cars crossing the border are advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port during the long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays to secure smooth access for PT vehicles to the above BCPs. Cross-boundary private cars may experience longer waiting times when crossing the BCPs during the peak periods. Motorists should pay extra attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the approach roads to the BCPs. In case of traffic congestion, they should remain patient and follow the instructions of on-site Police. For the HZMB, to plan their journeys ahead, members of the public can make use of the TD’s HKeMobility mobile app or website (hkemobility. gov. hk/en/traffic-information/live/cctv) to access snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the HZMB Hong Kong Port. They can also check the real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only). Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB Main Bridge. Vehicles must not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. Residents and visitors may visit “Easy Boundary” (www. sb. gov. hk/eng/bwt/status. html?type=outbound), a one-stop information platform on immigration clearance launched by the Security Bureau, or the HKeMobility to obtain useful information, including the respective average waiting time for passengers and private cars at land-based BCPs, as well as for the Gold Bus, the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) and MTR to plan their trips and save waiting time. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, the television broadcasts, the TD’s website (www. td. gov. hk) and the HKeMobility.
2026-04-01T18:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間（四月三日至七日）可能出現大量跨境人士及車輛經各陸路口岸往來香港和內地或澳門。運輸署呼籲跨境出行人士及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 運輸署已督導本地及跨境公共運輸服務營辦商（營辦商），在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間加大運力，預留足夠車輛及人手以應對跨境人士的出行需求。運輸署預計公共運輸服務（包括港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）及連接各陸路管制站的本地專營巴士「B」線）在跨境人流高峰時段的等候時間或會較長，乘客應避免於繁忙時段出行。候車期間遵守秩序，並遵從現場警務人員及營辦商職員的指示。計劃乘坐跨境巴士的人士亦應提早預訂車票。 駕駛跨境私家車出入境人士請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便保障公共運輸車輛能暢順前往上述口岸，跨境私家車或需輪候通過口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意前往口岸道路沿途的可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。如遇交通受阻，請保持忍讓及遵從現場警務人員的指示。 至於港珠澳大橋，市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」或網頁（hkemobility.gov.hk/tc/traffic-information/live/cctv），查閱大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時，應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除非獲珠海市當局指示，否則車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。 市民和旅客可透過保安局的一站式過關資訊平台「口岸通」（www.sb.gov.hk/chi/bwt/status.html?type=outbound）或「香港出行易」，取得各陸路口岸旅客和私家車過關平均輪候時間，以及金巴、落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士（皇巴）及港鐵服務的平均輪候時間等有用資訊，以便計劃行程及減省等候時間。市民請留意電台、電視台、運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

2026-04-02T06:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to heavy traffic at the road section leading from Airport Road to Hong Kong International Airport’s Terminal 1 Departures Kerb, motorists are advised to use the drop-off area at the Airport’s Car Park 1. Members of the public heading to the Airport are advised to allow sufficient time for their journey and consider taking the Airport Express and buses.
2026-04-02T06:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時機場路通往香港國際機場一號客運大樓離港層落客區的路段交通繁忙，駕駛人士請考慮改用機場一號停車場落客區。前往機場的市民，請預留足夠交通時間，並考慮乘搭機場快綫或巴士。

2026-04-02T14:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2026-04-02T14:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2026-04-02T17:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR): The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2026-04-02T17:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2026-04-02T17:35:00.CONTENT_EN:
A new train timetable of HSR will take effect from 15 April 2026. You may check the latest train information on the HSR website (timetable) or mobile app. 

To facilitate the timetable adjustment, ticket sales for some train trips will be slightly deferred. For the latest ticketing arrangements and ticket purchase, please visit the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.
2026-04-02T17:35:00.CONTENT_CN:
新的高速鐵路列車時間表將於2026年4月15日起生效。你可瀏覽高速鐵路網頁(時間表)或手機應用程式，查閱最新列車資訊。

為配合時間表調整，部分列車車票的開售時間將稍為延後。你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式購票，並留意車票開售情況。

2026-04-03T07:15:00.CONTENT_EN: The following road section(s) are busy: - Lin Cheung Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound) - Jordan Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound) Motorists passing through the above road section(s) are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2026-04-03T07:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下路段的交通繁忙: -連翔道(往香港西九龍站方向） -佐敦道(往香港西九龍站方向） 駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。
